articles.summary: 研究预训练视觉语言模型（VLM）能否直接从单张图像执行可编辑逆图形，重建为Blender程序，无需专用数据。分为多阶段管线，实现渲染、重光照和编辑。

articles.title: K-BrowseComp: A Web Browsing Agent Benchmark Grounded in Korean Contexts
articles.excerpt: Frontier model evaluations are shifting from foundational capabilities (e.g., instruction following and reasoning) toward compositional, agentic ones, but Korean agentic benchmarks remain scarce. We introduce K-BrowseComp, a web-browsing agent benchmark grounded in Korean contexts, consisting of 400 problems. The 300-problem K-BrowseComp-Verified subset is manually constructed and validated by nat
articles.summary: 提出K-BrowseComp，基于韩语语境的网页浏览agent基准，包含400个问题。其中300个问题的人工验证子集K-BrowseComp-Verified由母语者构建，填补韩语agent评价空白。

articles.title: Policy and World Modeling Co-Training for Language Agents
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) improves large language model (LLM) agents by teaching them which actions lead to high rewards, but provides little supervision on what those actions do to the environment. World modeling (WM) can fill this gap, yet existing approaches often require separate simulators, extra training stages, or additional inference-time computation. We observe that on-policy RL rollout
articles.summary: 提出策略与世界模型协同训练方法，利用在线RL rollout为语言agent提供环境动态监督。无需额外模拟器或推理开销，同时优化动作选择和结果预测。

articles.title: Harness-1: Reinforcement Learning for Search Agents with State-Externalizing Harnesses
articles.excerpt: Search agents are often trained as policies over growing transcripts: the model must decide how to search while also remembering what it has seen, which evidence is useful, which constraints remain open, and which claims have actually been checked. We argue that this formulation puts too much routine state management inside the policy: reinforcement learning is forced to optimize both semantic sea
articles.summary: 提出状态外化“Harness”框架，将搜索agent的例行状态管理从策略中剥离，使RL专注语义搜索决策。减少策略负担，提升对长轨迹的适应性。

articles.title: OpenWebRL: Demystifying Online Multi-turn Reinforcement Learning for Visual Web Agents
articles.excerpt: Building capable visual web agents requires long-horizon reasoning, precise grounding, and robust interaction with dynamic real-world websites. Despite rapid progress, the strongest systems remain largely proprietary, while open agents still depend heavily on supervised post-training over large collections of curated web trajectories. This dependence creates a major scalability bottleneck: high-qu
articles.summary: 开源视觉web agent系统OpenWebRL，探索在线多轮RL训练方式。减少对大规模人工轨迹的依赖，在动态真实网站上实现鲁棒交互与长程推理。

articles.title: AutoMedBench: Towards Medical AutoResearch with Agentic AI Models
articles.excerpt: Autonomous agents are increasingly expected to support end-to-end medical-AI research workflows, moving beyond isolated prediction tasks or short-form clinical question answering. However, existing medical agent benchmarks primarily evaluate final outputs, providing limited visibility into agent behavior within the research process. To address this gap, we present AutoMedBench, a workflow-aware be
articles.summary: 提出AutoMedBench，工作流感知的医学AI自主研究基准。评估agent在研究过程中的行为而非仅最终输出，揭示其规划、执行与调试能力。

articles.title: Joint Agent Memory and Exploration Learning via Novelty Signals
articles.excerpt: In open-ended environments, exploration is fundamental for autonomous agents, yet current language model agents struggle with this. Effective exploration requires memory, but retaining raw interaction histories is computationally expensive over long trajectories. While latent memory offers a solution to compress interaction histories, its training lacks reliable supervisory signals. We introduce J
articles.summary: 提出联合记忆与探索学习方法JAMEL，利用新颖性信号指导记忆压缩与探索。解决长轨迹中记忆监督缺失问题，降低计算开销。

articles.title: 3DCodeBench: Benchmarking Agentic Procedural 3D Modeling Via Code
articles.excerpt: Procedural 3D modeling through code is emerging as a versatile paradigm, offering deterministic, engine-ready, and precisely editable assets that neural 3D generators inherently lack. Authoring such procedural content, however, demands deep expertise in 3D software APIs, parametric design, and code-level geometric reasoning. In this paper, we propose 3DCodeBench, a systematic benchmark for evaluat
articles.summary: 提出3DCodeBench，系统化基准评估agent通过代码进行程序化3D建模的能力。覆盖多种3D软件API调用、参数化设计与几何推理任务。

articles.title: RoboStressBench: Benchmarking VLM Robustness to Physical Visual Stress in Embodied Scenes
articles.excerpt: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong visual understanding and are increasingly deployed in embodied AI systems, where reliable perception under real conditions is essential. However, existing benchmarks assess VLMs using clean images or isolated perturbations rather than stresses caused by physical scene formation. This design has two limitations: it covers only a narrow subset of every
articles.summary: 提出RoboStressBench，评估VLM在真实物理场景视觉应力（如光照变化、遮挡、运动模糊）下的鲁棒性。弥补现有基准使用干净图像的不足。

articles.title: Same Payload, Different Channel: Measuring Trust Asymmetry in Tool-Using Language Models
articles.excerpt: As language models take on agentic roles that span calling external APIs, reading tool outputs, and acting on instructions embedded in third-party content, their attack surface expands well beyond what users type. Whether a model treats a malicious instruction the same way regardless of where it arrives has not been systematically studied. We introduce the Safety Asymmetry Score (SAS), which measu
articles.summary: 提出Safety Asymmetry Score (SAS)，量化LM对不同输入通道（用户指令、工具输出、第三方内容）中恶意指令的响应差异。揭示工具使用LM的安全不对称性。

articles.title: Representation over Routing: Diagnosing Temporal Routing Pathologies in Multi-Timescale PPO
articles.excerpt: Temporal credit assignment in reinforcement learning is often approached by introducing value estimates at multiple discount factors. A natural next step is to let the actor dynamically route among these temporal heads, using either differentiable attention or heuristic uncertainty weights. This paper argues that such routing can create a numerical shortcut rather than a reliable temporal abstract
articles.summary: 诊断多时间尺度PPO中动态路由的数值捷径问题，主张用表征学习替代路由来改进时间信用分配。避免路由机制产生不可靠的抽象。

articles.title: Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism
articles.excerpt: Long-horizon search agents accumulate large amounts of retrieved content across many tool calls, making context-budget efficiency increasingly important. A minimal intervention is to mask stale observations from the context as the trajectory progresses, but it remains unclear when this form of context management helps and why. We study observation masking through a systematic sweep over various ag
articles.summary: 系统研究搜索agent中屏蔽陈旧观察对上下文预算效率的影响。绘制不同条件下的效果图谱并分析机制，指出该方法存在收益递减边界。

articles.title: Drift Q-Learning
articles.excerpt: Offline reinforcement learning requires improving a policy from fixed data while avoiding out-of-distribution actions with unreliable value estimates. Diffusion and flow policies handle this trade-off by modeling the behavior distribution to regularize the RL objective, but they require iterative denoising, solver integrations, and in more efficient variants, distillation or other approximations a
articles.summary: 提出Drift Q-Learning，一种离线RL方法。使用简化的Q学习更新替代扩散/流策略的复杂迭代过程，避免分布外动作并保持效率。

articles.title: StressDream: Steering Video World Models for Robust Policy Evaluation and Improvement
articles.excerpt: Video world models (WMs) have shown promise for policy evaluation and improvement by imagining realistic future observations conditioned on ego-robot actions. While WMs can model distributions over futures, policy evaluation and improvement typically rely on nominal imaginations, which can miss high-impact outcomes of robot actions unless prohibitively many samples are drawn. To enable robust poli
articles.summary: 提出StressDream，引导视频世界模型生成对抗性未来想象，用于鲁棒策略评估与改进。避免名义想象忽略高风险结果，采样高效。

articles.title: Capability Self-Assessment: Teaching LLMs to Know Their Limits
articles.excerpt: The ability to recognize one's own limitations and decide whether to solve a problem or delegate is fundamental for reliable intelligent systems. Yet we show that modern large language models systematically lack this ability: across diverse model families and scales, they overestimate their competence and attempt queries they cannot solve. We refer to this ability as Capability Self-Assessment (CS
articles.summary: 提出能力自我评估训练方法，使LLM识别自身局限并决定解决问题或委托。在多种模型与规模上验证，有效缓解过度自信与错误尝试。

articles.title: LongTraceRL: Learning Long-Context Reasoning from Search Agent Trajectories with Rubric Rewards
articles.excerpt: Long-context reasoning remains a central challenge for large language models, which often fail to locate and integrate key information in extensive distracting content. Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has shown promise for this task, yet existing methods are limited by low-confusability distractors and sparse, outcome-only reward signals that cannot supervise intermediate rea
articles.summary: 提出LongTraceRL，利用搜索agent轨迹与细粒度规则奖励训练长上下文推理。解决RLVR中低混淆干扰和稀疏奖励问题，提升信息定位与整合能力。

articles.excerpt: 上周末在新加坡举行的香格里拉对话会，让人们再次看到军备竞赛迹象。在亚太地区的安全局势整体呈恶化趋势的背景下，各国纷纷试图通过提高国防预算、升级武器装备来加强安全。

articles.title: 墙外文摘：台湾并非中美关系的核心问题
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/墙外文摘：台湾并非中美关系的核心问题/a-77363277?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 有研究者认为，台湾并非中美关系的核心问题。核心问题是中共的专制意识形态与自由世界民主原则之间不可调和的冲突。台湾只是暴露并放大了这一矛盾。

articles.title: 菲防长发出威胁警告 中国开始在黄岩岛附近巡逻
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/菲防长发出威胁警告-中国开始在黄岩岛附近巡逻/a-77363306?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 中国解放军和海警分别在周日表示，他们在黄岩岛附近海域进行了巡逻。此前一天，马尼拉称，尽管“特习会”后美中关系有所缓和，但菲律宾仍面临来自北京的“严重威胁”。上周，菲律宾和美国刚刚举行了联合海上演习。

articles.title: 美伊协议再生变数？特朗普要修改草案
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/美伊协议再生变数？特朗普要修改草案/a-77362950?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 美国总统特朗普要求对伊朗协议草案进行修改。此前，美方核心幕僚已就该协议内容与伊朗谈判代表达成初步共识。分析认为，美方此次提出的调整可能使谈判再度延长数日，并重新陷入新一轮拉锯。

articles.title: 日本驳斥中国“新军国主义”指控 反指北京正迅速军事扩张
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/日本驳斥中国-新军国主义-指控-反指北京正迅速军事扩张/a-77362191?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 日本防卫大臣在新加坡的防务论坛上驳斥了北京针对东京当局“新军国主义”的指控，并批评中国在缺乏透明度的情况下迅速扩充军力。同时，中方代表也对日本提出批评，质疑“一个没有彻底清算军国主义遗毒的国家，有何资格在国际场合大谈防务合作？”这突显了中日两国之间近期格外紧绷的关系。

articles.title: 摆脱中国稀土垄断 巴西接得住吗？
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/摆脱中国稀土垄断-巴西接得住吗？/a-77349821?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 矿产资源丰富的巴西，如今正试图成为稀土磁体材料的替代供应商，满足西方国家日益迫切的摆脱对华依赖之需求。目前，这个位于亚马逊雨林的国家已经吸引了大量国际资本，但是要想真正挑战中国，还有很长的路要走。

articles.title: 长平观察：为什么年轻人对AI时代喝倒彩？
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/长平观察：为什么年轻人对ai时代喝倒彩？/a-77356230?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 盖洛普最新调查显示，年轻人对人工智能前景感到乐观的比例，从去年的27%急剧下降至18%。时事评论作家长平回顾人类新技术革命的历史，批评新时代的人文主义侏儒症。

articles.title: 赫格塞斯：不会允许中国主导印太
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/赫格塞斯：不会允许中国主导印太/a-77354518?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 在新加坡香格里拉对话会上，美防长赫格塞斯强调印太“力量平衡”，弱化对华强硬表述；台湾议题虽未直接提及，但仍为地区安全焦点。

articles.title: 沦为中国的“小伙伴”：别无选择的俄罗斯对华科技合作
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/沦为中国的-小伙伴-：别无选择的俄罗斯对华科技合作/a-77319356?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 俄罗斯总统普京上周访问中国时，定于在今明两年举行“俄中教育年”双边合作活动。俄罗斯国内媒体则频发报道，称双边科技及教育合作屡攀新高。不过，分析人士指出，俄中科技领域的合作和其他领域相似：莫斯科只不过是北京的“小伙伴”。

articles.title: 俄无人机坠入居民楼后 罗马尼亚驱逐俄罗斯总领事
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/俄无人机坠入居民楼后-罗马尼亚驱逐俄罗斯总领事/a-77349834?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 一架俄罗斯无人机在罗马尼亚靠近乌克兰边境的一栋高层住宅楼上坠毁，造成两人受伤，并引发国际社会的担忧。罗马尼亚总统已宣布驱逐俄罗斯驻康斯坦察总领事。目前尚不确定该国是否动用北约第4条款请求启动磋商机制。

articles.title: 欧盟：对华贸易不可持续，须更多保护关键产业
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/欧盟：对华贸易不可持续，须更多保护关键产业/a-77349679?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 欧盟委员会周五就如何保护关键产业免受中国竞争对手冲击举行会谈后表示，欧盟必须采取更有力的行动，以重新平衡其与中国的贸易关系。

articles.title: 德语媒体：欧洲到底要不要反制中国的贸易政策？
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：欧洲到底要不要反制中国的贸易政策？/a-77346249?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 德国经济部长赖歇刚刚结束访华行程，欧盟就召开会议商讨如何对中国实施贸易反制措施。《南德意志报》刊评认为，赖歇并没有真正意识到德国的处境有多危险。《商报》则刊发了一正一反两篇评论，分析欧盟对华贸易政策利弊。

articles.title: 德语媒体：经济部长赖歇访华的平衡术
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：经济部长赖歇访华的平衡术/a-77333607?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 德国经济部长赖歇访华引起多家德媒的关注。毕竟，有专家指出，德国是“中国冲击波2.0”的 “震中”，德国工业界已流失数量显著的就业岗位。不过，德媒认为，赖歇访华“延续了往届德国政府十分温和的对华路线”，避免对抗，提出更多合作。

articles.title: AI不会抢人类饭碗？教宗警告科技催生“新型奴役”
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/ai不会抢人类饭碗？教宗警告科技催生-新型奴役/a-77330612?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 黄仁勋称“AI不会抢走你的工作”的同时，科技大厂却纷纷加速裁员。与硅谷乐观叙事相对，教宗警告AI可能侵蚀人类尊严，使就业问题上升为文明选择与伦理挑战。在拥抱AI的同时保护就业，这真的可行吗？

articles.title: “经济五贤人”下调德国增长预期 呼吁改革
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/经济五贤人-下调德国增长预期-呼吁改革/a-77326536?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 德国联邦政府最重要的智库之一、“经济五贤人”在本周三发布的春季经济报告时，呼吁柏林政府推行更多改革。这五位顶尖经济学家认为，执政联盟正面临巨大压力，必须采取措施提升德国面向未来的适应能力，特别是在社会保障领域。

articles.title: 川普曾批台「偷走晶片業」 賴清德贈張忠謀自傳盼促理解
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/川普曾批台「偷走晶片業」-賴清德贈張忠謀自傳盼促理解/a-77321882?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 川習會後，台灣議題持續受關注之際，台灣總統賴清德27日透過美國在台協會處長，贈送台積電創辦人張忠謀的自傳給美國總統川普，盼增進川普對台灣半導體產業的理解。同一天，台灣政府預告美方將正式公告對台灣非半導體232關稅的優惠措施。

articles.title: 德国经济部长访华：对话与分歧之间的艰难平衡
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德国经济部长访华：对话与分歧之间的艰难平衡/a-77318798?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 德国经济部长赖歇在北京寻求对话。然而，稀土问题、公平竞争以及关于欧盟加强贸易保护工具的讨论，表明这一寻求平衡的政策路线仍然面临相当大的挑战。

articles.title: 德语媒体：立志减肥 却依然总光顾同一家甜品店
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：立志减肥-却依然总光顾同一家甜品店/a-77316395?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 正值德国经济部长赖歇访问中国之际，瑙曼基金会发布了一项研究报告，指出德国对中国产太阳能板、锂电池、抗生素等关键产品的依赖度正在加速上升。德语区各大媒体纷纷就此发表评论，警告现在必须采取行动，否则后患无穷。

articles.title: 老佛爷北京关店：中国内需降温下 奢侈消费光环褪色
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/老佛爷北京关店：中国内需降温下-奢侈消费光环褪色/a-77314432?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 北京老佛爷百货5月27日正式闭店。中国内需走弱，消费趋于理性。在经济放缓与线上冲击下，奢侈品红利退潮，传统高端零售模式正面临前所未有的挑战。

articles.title: 特习会后 中国人权案件前景不明
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/特习会后-中国人权案件前景不明/a-77301951?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 特朗普表示，与习近平的会晤中提及两名政治犯：牧师金明日和香港媒体大亨黎智英。特朗普邀请习近平9月访美，活动人士敦促美国以此为契机，再次向北京施压。

articles.title: 德语媒体：中国间谍的隐秘生意
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：中国间谍的隐秘生意/a-77301527?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 就最近曝光的一起中国间谍案，《科隆城市报》发表客座评论称，中国情报机构在德国的首要目标，并非政界或议会，具有经济价值的技术信息似乎更受欢迎。《商报》评论称，特朗普和普京用战争和强权削弱自身地位之际，或许中国正在迎来一个重塑全球力量格局的历史性机会。

articles.title: 德语媒体：“特朗普绕不开中国 普京离不开中国”
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：-特朗普绕不开中国-普京离不开中国/a-77287928?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 《日报》发表评论称，中国正在快速发展成为世界的权力中心，而这一切很大程度上得益于美国总统特朗普的反复无常以及欧洲的被动观望。《法兰克福汇报》评论认为，中俄联手、美国混乱、欧洲缺乏行动力的当下，北京正在快速打造对自己有利的世界格局。

articles.title: 史上最大IPO：重重质疑中，马斯克冲刺首位万亿富翁
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/史上最大ipo：重重质疑中，马斯克冲刺首位万亿富翁/a-77264413?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf

articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/海湾国家：以激光武器对抗无人机/a-77266429?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
